title: BlackRock, Janus Henderson tokenized funds get instant redemptions with new $1 billion facility
message_html: BlackRock, Janus Henderson tokenized funds get instant redemptions with new $1 billion facility ...

title: Tether's T3 Crime Unit says it has frozen $450M in suspected illicit crypto
message_html: Tether's T3 Crime Unit says it has frozen $450M in suspected illicit crypto ...
snippet: T3 Financial Crime Unit says it has frozen over $450 million tied to suspected illicit activity as stablecoin compliance pressures intensify.

title: CME sets June 8 for Nasdaq-backed crypto index futures covering seven assets in first weighted contract
message_html: CME sets June 8 for Nasdaq-backed crypto index futures covering seven assets in first weighted contract ...
snippet: CME Group to launch Nasdaq CME Crypto Index futures June 8 — its first market-cap-weighted crypto contract covering BTC and six other assets.

title: Coinbase becomes Hyperliquid's official USDC treasury deployer as USDH sunsets
message_html: Coinbase becomes Hyperliquid's official USDC treasury deployer as USDH sunsets ...
snippet: Native Markets, the operator of Hyperliquid's USDH stablecoin, agreed to grant Coinbase the right to purchase USDH brand assets.

title: Upshift rolls out new vault platform providing bridging capital for instant RWA redemptions
message_html: Upshift rolls out new vault platform providing bridging capital for instant RWA redemptions ...
snippet: Dedicated USDC vaults will provide instant liquidity to RWA holders when they want to redeem, with LPs earning redemption fees.

title: Reap and TerraPay team up to expand local payout corridors globally
message_html: Reap and TerraPay team up to expand local payout corridors globally ...
snippet: Reap, the stablecoin-native global payments and financial platform infrastructure for businesses, today announced a strategic partnership with TerraPay, a global money movement company, to expand local cross-border payouts through direct access to domestic clearing systems worldwide.
